author: Lala Bulaqi Das, Proprietor, Muir Press (editor and publisher)
title: Tazkirah-i-'Alam
gloss: A monthly journal giving a brief historical sketch of the lives of the Moghal Emperors of India from the time of Timur the Great, with pictures, volume 1, containing the first twelve numbers.
publisher: Lala Bulaqi Das, Proprietor, Muir Press
price: Annual subscription, Rs. 18 (from public) and Rs. 36 (from Chiefs)
copyright: Lala Bulaqi Das, Delhi; No. 62, dated the 27th April, 1910.
notes: Differential pricing by class of subscriber.
